prose:
Frontier-orbital gap of aniline — DFT, tier ‘standard’ (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, no density fitting) in PySCF 2.x, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.  Geometry: user-supplied /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/aniline/aniline.xyz; single-point calculation (no further optimization).  SCF converged in 9 cycles.  No engine warnings were reported.

Results (energies in eV):
• HOMO = −5.553772 eV
• LUMO = −0.2489544 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 5.3048177 eV

Live run log was written during execution to the engine’s frontier task .out file alongside the result JSON (see cli_invocation path for exact location).
